source_url: AI product manager daily work and communication skills
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Ivy. Day 1 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about AI product manager daily work. It shared useful communication skills.

The video explained that AI product managers work with engineers and designers. They also talk to business teams. Good communication is very important.

From this I learned that we should use simple words. Avoid technical terms when talking to business people. Listen more than you talk. Ask questions to understand needs. Show data to support your ideas. Be patient when explaining AI concepts.

These tips help me in my daily work. I will try to use them more.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
嗨，大家好，我是Ivy。每天英语练习的第一天。我坚持说话来提高我的口语英语。

今天我观看了一个关于AI产品经理日常工作的视频。它分享了一些有用的沟通技巧。

视频解释说，AI产品经理需要与工程师和设计师合作。他们还要与业务团队沟通。良好的沟通非常重要。

从中我学到，我们应该使用简单的词语。与业务人员交谈时避免使用技术术语。多听少说。通过提问来了解需求。用数据支持你的想法。解释AI概念时要耐心。

这些技巧对我的日常工作很有帮助。我会试着更多地使用它们。

谢谢聆听，明天见。
